events.name: Atlanta United FC at Columbus Crew
Philadelphia Union at Inter Miami CF

headlines.description: Messi, who almost never gets subbed out of matches, left in the 73rd minute, meaning he was long gone before Luis Suárez's third goal of the night lifted the defending MLS champions past the last-place Philadelphia Union 6-4 on Sunday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Messi subbed off early in Miami win over Philadelphia

video.headline: Inter Miami CF vs. Philadelphia Union - Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Inter Miami CF vs. Philadelphia Union - Game Highlights) 2026/05/24 ESHEET

events.name: Austin FC at St. Louis CITY SC
Real Salt Lake at Minnesota United FC

headlines.description: Mauricio González subbed on in the 77th minute for Minnesota United and scored his first career goal in stoppage time Saturday in 1-1 tie with Real Salt Lake.
headlines.shortLinkText: Minnesota scores in stoppage time to draw with RSL

events.name: New England Revolution at Charlotte FC
Orlando City SC at FC Cincinnati
Toronto FC at Chicago Fire FC
New York City FC at Nashville SC
Red Bull New York at Sporting Kansas City
San Jose Earthquakes at Portland Timbers
Vancouver Whitecaps at San Diego FC

keyEvents.text: Sean Zawadzki (Columbus Crew) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Columbus Crew 1, Atlanta United 0. Sékou Bangoura (Columbus Crew) left footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Mohamed Farsi following a fast break.
Goal! Columbus Crew 2, Atlanta United 0. Diego Rossi (Columbus Crew) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Mohamed Farsi.
Elías Báez (Atlanta United) is shown the yellow card.
Substitution, Atlanta United. Miguel Almirón replaces Luke Brennan.
Sékou Bangoura (Columbus Crew) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Columbus Crew. Hugo Picard replaces Max Arfsten.
Substitution, Columbus Crew. Yevhen Cheberko replaces Steven Moreira.
Substitution, Columbus Crew. Dylan Chambost replaces Taha Habroune.
Substitution, Atlanta United. Sérgio Santos replaces Saba Lobjanidze.
Substitution, Columbus Crew. Andrés Herrera replaces Mohamed Farsi.
Substitution, Columbus Crew. Amar Sejdic replaces Sékou Bangoura.
Enea Mihaj (Atlanta United) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Rudy Camacho (Columbus Crew) is shown the yellow card.
Tristan Muyumba (Atlanta United) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Second Half ends, Columbus Crew 2, Atlanta United 0.

keyEvents.text: Goal! Inter Miami CF 0, Philadelphia Union 1. Milan Iloski (Philadelphia Union) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Frankie Westfield with a headed pass.
Dayne St. Clair (Inter Miami CF) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Inter Miami CF 0, Philadelphia Union 2. Milan Iloski (Philadelphia Union) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the centre of the goal.
Goal! Inter Miami CF 1, Philadelphia Union 2. Germán Berterame (Inter Miami CF) right footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Lionel Messi.
Geiner Martínez (Philadelphia Union) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Inter Miami CF 1, Philadelphia Union 3. Bruno Damiani (Philadelphia Union) left footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal.
Jovan Lukic (Philadelphia Union) is shown the yellow card.
Goal! Inter Miami CF 2, Philadelphia Union 3. Luis Suárez (Inter Miami CF) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Ian Fray.
Ian Fray (Inter Miami CF) is shown the yellow card.
Goal! Inter Miami CF 3, Philadelphia Union 3. Germán Berterame (Inter Miami CF) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Lionel Messi with a through ball.
Goal! Inter Miami CF 4, Philadelphia Union 3. Luis Suárez (Inter Miami CF) right footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal.
Goal! Inter Miami CF 4, Philadelphia Union 4. Milan Iloski (Philadelphia Union) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the top right corner.
Telasco Segovia (Inter Miami CF) is shown the yellow card.
First Half ends, Inter Miami CF 4, Philadelphia Union 4.
Second Half begins Inter Miami CF 4, Philadelphia Union 4.
Sergio Reguilón (Inter Miami CF) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Philadelphia Union. Ezekiel Alladoh replaces Augustín Anello.
Substitution, Philadelphia Union. Alejandro Bedoya replaces Cavan Sullivan.
Substitution, Philadelphia Union. Jeremy Rafanello replaces Geiner Martínez.
Substitution, Inter Miami CF. David Ayala replaces Telasco Segovia.
Substitution, Inter Miami CF. Facundo Mura replaces Sergio Reguilón.
Substitution, Inter Miami CF. Mateo Silvetti replaces Lionel Messi because of an injury.
Danley Jean Jacques (Philadelphia Union) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Inter Miami CF 5, Philadelphia Union 4. Luis Suárez (Inter Miami CF) left footed shot from very close range to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Germán Berterame following a fast break.
Substitution, Philadelphia Union. Finn Sundstrom replaces Frankie Westfield.
Substitution, Philadelphia Union. Philippe Ndinga replaces Bruno Damiani.
Substitution, Inter Miami CF. David Ruíz replaces Yannick Bright.
Substitution, Inter Miami CF. Noah Allen replaces Ian Fray.
Gonzalo Luján (Inter Miami CF) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

Goal! Inter Miami CF 6, Philadelphia Union 4. Rodrigo De Paul (Inter Miami CF) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Mateo Silvetti following a fast break.
Noah Allen (Inter Miami CF) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Second Half ends, Inter Miami CF 6, Philadelphia Union 4.
